query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gs1_validation_rules (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  ruleId VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  ruleIdBelu VARCHAR(50),
  ruleType ENUM('benelux', 'gdsn', 'local') NOT NULL,
  errorMessageDutch TEXT,
  errorMessageEnglish TEXT,
  severity ENUM('error', 'warning', 'info') DEFAULT 'error',
  targetMarkets TEXT,
  targetSectors TEXT,
  affectedAttributes TEXT,
  validationLogic TEXT,
  addedInVersion VARCHAR(20),
  changeType ENUM('new', 'technical', 'textual', 'delete'),
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX rule_id_idx (ruleId),
  INDEX rule_type_idx (ruleType),
  INDEX active_idx (isActive)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 31QbGTVHxF7ThTp.root --database cozU6EotfgGjqPV9552owj --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gs1_validation_rules (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  ruleId VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  ruleIdBelu VARCHAR(50),
  ruleType ENUM('benelux', 'gdsn', 'local') NOT NULL,
  errorMessageDutch TEXT,
  errorMessageEnglish TEXT,
  severity ENUM('error', 'warning', 'info') DEFAULT 'error',
  targetMarkets TEXT,
  targetSectors TEXT,
  affectedAttributes TEXT,
  validationLogic TEXT,
  addedInVersion VARCHAR(20),
  changeType ENUM('new', 'technical', 'textual', 'delete'),
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX rule_id_idx (ruleId),
  INDEX rule_type_idx (ruleType),
  INDEX active_idx (isActive)
);
